name: lazy-flow
description: Open-source DORA + Flow + PR + Code + Agile metrics platform for Claude Code. Fuses GitHub and Jira into a local-first, fully-transparent delivery intelligence layer that Claude can query directly over SQL.

github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token or App installation token. Required for GitHub sync.

jira_oauth_token.description: Jira Cloud API token (create at id.atlassian.com → API tokens). Used with jira_email for Basic auth. Required for Jira sync.

jira_email.description: Atlassian account email for the API token, e.g. you@acme.com. Required alongside the Jira API token.

jira_base_url.description: Jira Cloud base URL, e.g. https://acme.atlassian.net. Required for Jira sync.

repos.description: Comma-separated list of GitHub repositories to track, e.g. ORG/app,ORG/api. Use ORG/* to track every repo in an organisation (excludes archived repos and forks); wildcards and explicit entries can be mixed, e.g. ORG/*,OTHER/special.

jira_projects.description: Comma-separated list of Jira project keys to track, e.g. ENG,INFRA
